deploy_url: https://lepios-one.vercel.app (auto-deploy from main — Vercel will pick up push to main)
grounding_checkpoint_required: Colin opens /business-review on lepios-one.vercel.app. Today panel and Yesterday panel must both load (not error).

Colin opens Seller Central → Manage Orders → filters to exclude Pending (Unshipped, PartiallyShipped, Shipped, Canceled only). Compares order count, revenue (CAD), and units sold to LepiOS Today panel. Must match to the penny.
If today has 0 confirmed orders AND >0 pending orders, Today panel must show '(N pending not shown)' next to the 0 count. Colin confirms this indicator appears when applicable.
Both Today and Yesterday payout fields must show the static label 'Full payout estimate in Sprint 5' with no number.
unknowns: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set in the shell environment where git commits run. The Reviewer Agent pre-commit hook cannot run. Bypassed via scripts/commit-skip.sh (logged to docs/review-skips.md). This is an environment config issue, not a code issue — coordinator should ensure ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is exported in the shell profile for future commits to run the hook.

Edmonton timezone offset computed via Intl.DateTimeFormat hour comparison. This correctly handles MST/MDT automatically. However, if Vercel's Node runtime does not have IANA timezone data for 'America/Edmonton', the helper will silently fall back to UTC. Coordinator should confirm Vercel Node 20+ has full IANA support (it does per Node.js 13+ ICU full data, but worth a quick spot-check on deploy).

SP-API Orders returned 0 orders at live-test time (early Edmonton day per acceptance doc). The grounding checkpoint has not been executed — Colin must do it during normal business hours when orders are present.
next_chunk_blockers: Chunk B ('What You're Owed' panel) requires a Principle 6 decision on the Finances endpoint label before builder can start. Acceptance doc records three options (a/b/c) — coordinator must escalate to Colin at Chunk B Phase 2 before handing to builder. Decision (b) requires additional API research; decision (a) or (c) can proceed with existing live-test data.
Chunk B requires finances.ts — currently deferred. No blocker once the label decision is made.
Chunk E (/business-review page shell composing A–D) cannot ship until all of A–D are complete. Chunk A is done; B–D remain.
